description: Set up the development environment: install Python 3.13 dependencies and run existing tests to confirm baseline is green.
steps: Use pyenv to switch to Python 3.13.13
Create a virtual environment at .venv using python3.13
Install all runtime dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], sqlalchemy[asyncio], aiosqlite, httpx, pydantic, jinja2, python-multipart, Pillow, rapidfuzz, segno, argon2-cffi, itsdangerous
Install test dependencies: pytest, pytest-asyncio, hypothesis, httpx
Run pnpm install to get opencv.js and thrustcurve-db client assets
Run python -m pytest tests/ -v and confirm all tests pass
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (python -m pytest tests/ -v returns exit code 0)
pnpm install succeeds and opencv.js is present at flight_card_scanner/static/js/node_modules/opencv.js/
verification: Run: pyenv shell 3.13.13 && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install fastapi 'uvicorn[standard]' 'sqlalchemy[asyncio]' aiosqlite httpx pydantic jinja2 python-multipart Pillow rapidfuzz segno argon2-cffi itsdangerous pytest pytest-asyncio hypothesis httpx && pnpm install && python -m pytest tests/ -v
